untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit divergence detection (price vs momentum coherence/phase alignment) and magnitude comparison (>= 25% of prior divergence). No direct divergence or coherence indicator available in allowed list. MACD used as momentum proxy, but true price/momentum divergence analysis and coherence threshold calculations cannot be expressed with available indicators and operators.
translation_notes: Used MACD as momentum indicator proxy (closest available). Signal specifies 2+ bar confirmation of reversal in both price and momentum with coherence, requiring custom divergence logic not available in standard indicator set. Parameters confirmation_bars=2, coherence_threshold_percent=25, divergence_lookback_bars=15 cannot be directly implemented. Stop loss set to 1 ATR equivalent (1.0%) as specified.
